content: Just as human language learners consolidate long-term learning by deliberate written reflection on vocabulary usage and writing outputs, current LLM self-reflection mechanisms can borrow the structured reflection scaffolding from high school English writing workshops to improve their autonomous self-critique quality. This frames the original Reflexion autonomous AI agent framework not just as a novel AI architecture innovation, but as a formalization of the same deliberate reflection pedagogy that human learners use to build mastery.
